overall.description: Gameplay footage from GTA V depicting a flooded urban area at dusk during a storm. The camera moves slowly through deep water alongside a building wall, passing vegetation and revealing a large roller coaster structure in the distance. The player character dies mid-sequence as indicated by the 'WASTED' text appearing on screen.

scene_state.functional_zone: flooded urban walkway alongside building wall

agents.ego_description: swimming or wading slowly through deep flood water alongside a building wall, moving toward a large roller coaster structure

entered.detail: large metal roller coaster track structure with multiple loops and supports silhouetted against the dark sky
smooth concrete or plaster exterior wall of a multi-story building running parallel to the camera path
calm reflective flood water covering the ground, reflecting the roller coaster and sky
curved metal fence or railing structure partially submerged in water

segments.scene_description: The segment opens with a first-person view moving through deep flood water in an urban area at dusk. A large roller coaster structure dominates the center view while a building wall runs along the right side. The water surface is calm and reflective, with a metal railing visible on the left. The atmosphere is dark and stormy with low visibility due to the time of day.

scene_state.functional_zone: flooded building perimeter with overgrown vegetation

events.description: player character dies in the water, indicated by the red 'WASTED' text appearing in the bottom left corner of the screen

agents.ego_description: continuing to move forward through the flood water, passing dense bushes and vegetation growing alongside the building wall

entered.detail: dense cluster of leafy bushes and small trees growing against the building wall, partially submerged in flood water

segments.scene_description: As the camera moves forward, dense vegetation comes into view on the right side, growing along the building wall. The roller coaster structure appears closer and more detailed. At approximately 32 seconds, the player character dies and the 'WASTED' text appears, though the camera continues moving forward through the water. The building wall recedes slightly to the right as the vegetation becomes the dominant feature on that side.

scene_state.functional_zone: open flooded plaza with amusement park structure

agents.ego_description: moving through open water past the vegetation line, with an unobstructed view of the roller coaster and distant city skyline

entered.detail: silhouettes of distant urban buildings and skyscrapers visible on the horizon beyond the roller coaster

segments.scene_description: The camera emerges from the vegetation-lined section into a more open flooded area. The bushes pass out of view behind the camera, revealing a wider perspective of the roller coaster tracks extending into the distance. The building wall continues to recede to the right, and the distant city skyline becomes visible on the left horizon. The 'WASTED' text remains on screen as the forward movement continues through the calm flood waters.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous forward movement through a flooded urban landscape at dusk that transitions from a narrow corridor into a wide, open vista. It begins by gliding through deep, reflective water alongside a building wall, with a massive roller coaster structure looming in the distance under a dark, stormy sky. As the camera advances, dense vegetation emerges along the right side and the roller coaster grows more detailed, just as the WASTED text appears on screen to signal the character's death. The scene then opens up as the bushes recede, shifting the perspective toward a broader expanse of calm floodwaters. Finally, the camera reveals the full extent of the roller coaster tracks and a distant city skyline on the horizon while the death notification remains visible.
